evals.prompt: 帮我初始化一个 llm wiki，我想用它来跟踪我的 AI 研究笔记和论文阅读，vault 就用 ~/Documents/Obsidian Vault
evals.expected_output: Detects vault, confirms with user, creates full directory structure (raw/, wiki/sources/, wiki/concepts/, wiki/entities/, wiki/comparisons/, output/), generates SCHEMA.md customized for AI research domain, creates index.md and log.md with initialization entry

evals.prompt: 我把一篇关于 RAG 架构的文章放到了 raw/ 目录下，帮我处理一下。文章讲了几种 RAG 架构模式：naive RAG、advanced RAG、modular RAG，还有对 Fine-tuning 的对比
evals.expected_output: Reads raw source, creates source summary page in wiki/sources/, creates/updates wiki/concepts/rag-architectures.md, creates/updates wiki/concepts/fine-tuning.md, creates entity pages for mentioned tools/authors, updates index.md with all new pages, appends to log.md

evals.prompt: 帮我检查一下 wiki 的健康状况，然后告诉我目前 wiki 里关于 transformer 的内容有哪些
evals.expected_output: Runs lint workflow checking for contradictions/stale/orphans/gaps, then reads index.md to find transformer-related pages, reads relevant pages, synthesizes answer with wikilink citations, suggests any missing concepts or sources to add
